title: 600mm x 10m Corrugated Cardboard Paper Roll - 10 Metres
features: 600MM X 10M CORRUGATED ROLL: The rolls feature a smooth paper layer on one side, with concertina-style corrugated fluting on the other.
CORRUGATED CARDBOARD ROLLS: All variations of our Corrugated Rolls offer excellent protective cushioning and shock absorption properties for fragile or delicate goods such as paintings,
SMOOTH LAYER: To use, simply roll or insert your item on the inner, fluted side of the roll and seal together.
description: Product Description Corrugated Cardboard Rolls Corrugated cardboard rolls are a friendly alternative to bubble wrap, they can be reused and recycled. These rolls have been designed to wrap around and protect your items. Strong Corrugated Cardboard Rolls Manufactured from naturally sourced recycled paper corrugated rolls are practical, robust and reliable. Suitable for everyday packaging tasks, the rolls can be cut and shaped to accommodate a desired size. Corrugated cardboard rolls are extremely easy to use, they take up minimal space in storage. The paper is supplied on a roll which is extremely easy to transport and store. Featuring a layer of raised corrugated fluting on one side, this provides superb protection to your goods and is excellent for cushioning delicate items during transportation. Available in a range of sizes, the paper has a rustic and non-slippy texture. The roll design ensures no excess paper is wasted by keeping paper use minimal. The rolls are lightweight which keeps postage costs considerably low. Versatile Manufactured from recycled corrugated paper, these rolls can be recycled once used. Featuring a layer of raised corrugated fluting on one side which provides excellent protection to goods in transit and storage. Accommodating Corrugated rolls are extremely versatile and can accommodate various purposes. The rolls can be cut up and shaped to accommodate various sizes.. They can be easily cut with scissors and can also wrap around sharp corners or edges without tearing. Practical Corrugated cardboard rolls can be used to protect items during transportation and also void filling. The paper is supplied on a roll which is easy to access, handle and maintain. The roll can be transported around easily and takes up minimal space in storage. Robust The corrugated paper is robust and strong. It works as an excellent shock absorber and keeps items stable during harsh movements and turns during transit.
